THEWITCH-BOTTLED_CURIOSITY.title: Bottled Curiosity
THEWITCH-BOTTLED_CURIOSITY.description: Whenever you enter an unknown [gold]?[/gold] location, obtain a random potion.
THEWITCH-BOTTLED_CURIOSITY.flavor: It rattles when you wander off the beaten path. Approvingly.
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_POCKETS.title: Bottomless Pockets
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_POCKETS.description: Upon pickup, your potion slot bonus becomes [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue].
THEWITCH-BOTTOMLESS_POCKETS.flavor: She reached in past the elbow and kept going.
THEWITCH-LARGE_POCKETS.title: Large Pockets
THEWITCH-LARGE_POCKETS.flavor: Deep pockets, deeper secrets — always room for one more bottle.
THEWITCH-COZY_NEST.title: Cozy Nest
THEWITCH-COZY_NEST.description: At the start of combat, summon an [gold]Owl Familiar[/gold].
THEWITCH-COZY_NEST.flavor: Someone's been keeping it warm for you.
THEWITCH-SACK_OF_TREATS.title: Sack of Treats
THEWITCH-SACK_OF_TREATS.description: Your [gold]Familiars[/gold] create ALL of their cards at the start of your turn.
THEWITCH-SACK_OF_TREATS.flavor: Something for everyone. Some of it still moving.
THEWITCH-WORMYS_APPLE.title: Wormy's Apple
THEWITCH-WORMYS_APPLE.description: Upon pickup, gain [green]{MaxHp}[/green] Max HP. At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Wormy[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEWITCH-WORMYS_APPLE.flavor: Sweet to the core — and the core's already taken.
